responsibilities.title: Module manifest, registration and lazy preload
responsibilities.notes: Contains config imports, dynamic import paths, module cache, preloading and modules.register wiring. Extract first because it has clear inputs and few DOM dependencies.

responsibilities.title: Session persistence lifecycle hooks
responsibilities.notes: Pure page lifecycle and external-link persistence hooks around projectStorage.

responsibilities.title: Global module navigation gesture guard
responsibilities.notes: Pointer/click boundary must preserve the 37B mobile swipe guard and single click route-change semantics.

responsibilities.title: Module runtime bootstrap and route render bridge
responsibilities.notes: Creates ModuleRuntime, initializes router, renders quick access settings and project-loaded remount bridge.

responsibilities.title: Lazy PDF export bootstrap
responsibilities.notes: Already lazy loaded; extraction should preserve one-shot promise semantics.

responsibilities.title: Resize-driven navigation refresh
responsibilities.notes: RAF throttled resize hook. Safe to extract once navigation gestures are isolated.

responsibilities.title: Theme mode and UI storage helpers
responsibilities.notes: Theme state currently shares settings-panel DOM constants and storage helpers; extract with explicit initThemeController().

responsibilities.title: Feedback form submission controller
responsibilities.notes: Hardcoded endpoint remains known tech debt; extraction should parameterize endpoint/version/currentRoute without changing behavior.

responsibilities.title: Release notes loader and renderer
responsibilities.notes: Self-contained parser/render path. Needs escapeHtml local to the module.

responsibilities.title: Idle pre-initialization for PDF export
responsibilities.notes: Move together with PDF bootstrap to preserve early menu readiness.

responsibilities.title: Settings drawer, scroll lock and submenu state
responsibilities.notes: Highest-risk extraction because it owns iOS scroll lock, focus restore, submenu persistence and touchmove prevention. Requires 37B smoke coverage after extraction.

responsibilities.title: Header transparency on scroll
responsibilities.notes: Small passive scroll controller; safe extraction.

responsibilities.title: Service worker registration and cache update message
responsibilities.notes: Preserve no-forced-reload behavior and APP_VERSION cache busting.

extractionOrder.name: Service worker shell controller and closure

findings.title: app.js still owns 13 responsibilities
findings.detail: The file remains an app-shell monolith. The immediate risk is not runtime correctness but high coupling before further platform work.

findings.title: Settings panel extraction is the highest-risk refactor
findings.detail: Settings owns scroll lock, focus restore and Safari touchmove prevention. It must be extracted after lower-risk controllers and guarded by 37B browser smokes.

findings.title: Feedback endpoint remains hardcoded
findings.detail: Keep behavior unchanged in 37C; after extraction the endpoint should become an injected controller option in a later security/config phase.

policy.stopCondition: Any new browser console error, module smoke regression or settings scroll-lock regression stops the refactor.
